name: pkgutil
description: Query and manipulate for macOS Installer packages and receipts

subcommands.name: --packages
subcommands.description: List all installed package IDs on the specified --volume

subcommands.name: --pkgs-plist
subcommands.description: List all installed package IDs, in Mac OS X plist(5) format, on the specified --volume

subcommands.name: --files
subcommands.description: List all of the files installed under the package-id

args.name: package-id
args.description: The package ID to list the files of

subcommands.name: --export-plist
subcommands.description: Print all receipt information about the specified package-id in Mac OS X plist(5) format

args.name: package-id
args.description: The package ID to export the plist of

subcommands.name: --verify
subcommands.description: Run repair_packages(8) to verify the specified package-id

subcommands.name: --repair
subcommands.description: Run repair_packages(8) to repair the specified package-id

subcommands.name: --pkg-info
subcommands.description: Print extended information about the specified package-id

args.name: package-id
args.description: The package ID to print the info of

subcommands.name: --pkg-info-plist
subcommands.description: Print extended information about the specified package-id in Mac OS X plist(5) format

args.name: package-id
args.description: The package ID to print the info of

subcommands.name: --forget
subcommands.description: Discard all receipt data about package-id, but don't touch installed files

subcommands.name: --learn
subcommands.description: Update the ACLs of the given path in the receipt identified by --edit-pkg

args.name: path
args.description: The path to update ACLs on

subcommands.name: --pkg-groups
subcommands.description: List all of the package groups this package-id is a member of

args.name: package-id
args.description: The package ID to list the groups of

subcommands.name: --groups
subcommands.description: List all of the package groups ont he specified --volume

subcommands.name: --group-plist
subcommands.description: List all of the package groups ont he specified --volume in Mac OS X plist(5) format

subcommands.name: --group-pkgs
subcommands.description: List all of the packages that are members of this group-id

args.name: group-id
args.description: The group ID to list the packages of

subcommands.name: --file-info
subcommands.description: Show the metadata known about path

args.name: path
args.description: The path to show the metadata of

subcommands.name: --file-info-plist
subcommands.description: Show the metadata known about path in Mac OS X plist(5) format

args.name: path
args.description: The path to show the metadata of

subcommands.name: --expand
subcommands.description: Expand the flat package at pkg-path into a new directory specified by dir-path

args.name: pkg-path
args.description: The path to the flat package to expand

args.name: dir-path
args.description: The path to the directory to expand the package into

subcommands.name: --flatten
subcommands.description: Flatten the dir-path into a new flat package created at pkg-path

args.name: dir-path
args.description: The path to the directory to flatten

args.name: pkg-path
args.description: The path to the flat package to create

subcommands.name: --bom
subcommands.description: Extract any BOM files from the flat pkg at path into /tmp and return the filename(s)

args.name: path
args.description: The path to the flat package to extract the BOM from

subcommands.name: --payload-files
subcommands.description: List the files archived within the uninstalled flat package(s) at path

args.name: path
args.description: The path to the flat package to list the archived files of

subcommands.name: --check-signature
subcommands.description: Check the validity and trust of the signature on the package at pkg-path

args.name: pkg-path
args.description: The path to the flat package to check the signature of

options.description: A brief summary of commands and usage
Skip confirmation before a potentially destructive or ambiguous action
Perform all operations on specified volume
Specifies an existing receipt to be modified in-place by --learn

arg.name: package-id
arg.description: Package ID of the receipt to modify

options.description: List only files (not directories) in --files listing
List only directories (not files) in --files listing
Use regex to match package-id arguments, if an exact match isn't found
List all installed package IDs, optionally matching kwarg REGEXP, on the specified --volume
